untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (head-and-shoulders with specific shoulder identification at point E) and zigzag filter threshold logic that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Properties). The core logic depends on: (1) identifying geometric patterns in price structure (point E as right shoulder), (2) calculating zigzag filter penetration distance ratios (150% threshold), and (3) confirming neckline penetration with pattern-specific geometry. These require custom pattern recognition algorithms beyond the scope of standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot point neckline analogy and ATR for volatility confirmation, but this does not capture the actual head-and-shoulders pattern geometry, point E identification, or zigzag filter logic described in the source material. The signal is fundamentally pattern-recognition based and requires custom indicator development.
